name: Career Ops 10-Dimension Rubric
description: Configurable scoring rubric for high-volume Career Ops comparison. Weights should sum near 1.0 before risk subtraction.

dimensions.label: Profile Match
dimensions.description: How strongly the job matches CV skills, role goals, and preferred companies.

dimensions.label: ATS Coverage
dimensions.description: How many profile keywords are covered by the job description.

dimensions.label: Role Fit
dimensions.description: Whether title and description match the target role family.

dimensions.label: Seniority Fit
dimensions.description: Whether seniority is plausible for the candidate.

dimensions.label: Location Fit
dimensions.description: Location, remote, hybrid, and market preference fit.

dimensions.label: Source Quality
dimensions.description: Reliability and richness of the source, prioritizing ATS APIs and structured data.

dimensions.label: Freshness
dimensions.description: Newer active jobs are prioritized over stale or expired listings.

dimensions.label: Growth Signal
dimensions.description: Growth, ownership, platform, AI/data, and rare skill upside.

dimensions.label: Application Effort
dimensions.description: Lower effort, clearer apply path, and richer JD improve the score.

riskPenalty.description: Subtract for expired jobs, low-information postings, and avoid/risk keywords.
